log: === ROUND 1 ===

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 3 ===

→ Chromatic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster: SUCCESS. 14 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Chromatic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Lich's turn ---

→ Chromatic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 36 fire damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
